about.title: About
about.description: I am an independent brand designer based in Costa Rica. I specialize in creating strategic brands, social media content, and unique websites that resonate with your audience. With a keen eye for aesthetics and a deep understanding of strategy, my expertise will take your brand from ordinary to exceptional.
about.what_i_do_description: As a brand designer, I craft unique visual identities that resonate with audiences. I create compelling logos, cohesive branding materials, and engaging visual elements.
about.why_i_do_it_description: I am passionate about helping brands tell their stories through design. I believe that a well-designed brand can transform a business, build trust, and forge meaningful connections with its audience.
about.how_i_do_it_description: I start with a deep understanding of each client's vision and goals, followed by a thorough research and creative exploration process. My approach involves meticulous attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality, tailored solutions. Through collaboration and creativity, I ensure that each brand design is both visually striking and strategically sound.
about.work_together_text_1: If you're ready to start a new dream project, click the button
about.work_together_text_2: below to fill our enquiry form so we can work together!
about.send_info_title_1: GET ACCESS TO MY SERVICE GUIDE!
about.paragraph: As the creative mind behind “Natalia Villalobos,” I believe creativity is the starting point of every great business. For me, a brand is not just something visual, it's strategy, intention, and an authentic way of communicating who you are.
about.paragraph2: I approach branding and design as a conscious process, where exploring, creating, and enjoying the journey are also part of the experience. Together with a specialized team in different areas, we approach each project in an integral and strategic way.
about.paragraph3: Because when a brand is built with creativity, purpose, and the right team, it feels real, connects deeply, and stands the test of time.

home.text_box: We guide the entire creative process, from strategy to visual identity and its applications, combining creativity, intention, and expertise to build brands with personality. Because designing your brand can also be a conscious and enjoyable process.
home.testimony_1: Before working with you, I felt that my brand wasn't clear and didn't truly represent what I wanted to communicate. I had many ideas but didn't know how to organize them or turn them into a cohesive visual identity. I felt insecure about how others would perceive my project. Thanks to your work, you brought my brand to life and gave it personality, creating a logo and identity that truly reflect what Pikoli means to me. Now I feel proud and confident presenting it, because I know it communicates exactly what I want to express.
home.testimony_2: Working with Natalia was a pleasure from every perspective. At first, I was very unsure about hiring her because I thought I could do it myself,  I believed I didn't need a designer and that it was an easy task that could be done in one day. But the amount of effort she puts in and how thoughtfully crafted the final result is truly admirable. Every detail matters. Now the value of my brand is completely different. It’s solid and has a clear reason to exist, beyond just selling a product or service that we strongly believe in. She gave that project a face and made it real. I’m very excited to continue working with her. Thank you for everything!
home.testimony_3: I've worked on several brand identities with Natalia, and she is simply the best. From her design aesthetic to her responsibility and professionalism. I wouldn't change her for anyone.
home.testimony_4: It has been a huge step forward for my business in terms of image. Your creativity and professionalism make anyone feel comfortable trusting their project in your hands. Thank you for the attention to detail. Very happy with the result!
home.testimony_5: I really loved the way you work, super organized. I always knew which stage of the process we were in, and that gave me so much peace of mind. I truly appreciate the accessibility to communicate and make necessary adjustments, as well as the excellent customer service.

mywork.text_box: Explore some of the projects we’ve worked on, where design becomes a strategic tool to build strong and cohesive brands.

services.branding_description: Crafting a unique and strategic identity for your business that resonates with your target audience. From logo design to complete brand guidelines, we ensure your brand stands out.
services.collaterals_description: Creating essential brand collaterals like business cards, packaging, and promotional materials that maintain brand consistency and enhance your marketing efforts.
services.social_description: Elevating your social media presence with engaging content and cohesive visuals. We create strategies and designs that drive engagement and build your online community.
services.web_description: Designing user-friendly, visually stunning websites that reflect your brand's identity. We focus on functionality and aesthetics to provide an exceptional user experience.
services.photography_description: Capturing high-quality images that align with your brand’s identity. Whether it's product photography, lifestyle shots, or corporate headshots, we ensure your visuals tell your brand's story.
services.faq_question_1: What is the one concept method?
services.faq_answer_1: The One Concept Method is an approach where we focus all our time and energy on developing one strong and powerful design concept for your brand. This method ensures a clear direction, allowing us to refine and perfect it strategically to best represent your brand’s vision and values.
services.faq_question_2: If I already have a logo, can I hire a branding or social media package?
services.faq_answer_2: We approach every project with passion, aiming to truly represent each client’s vision and brand. If you already have a logo, we start with an audit to evaluate your current identity and determine the most strategic path forward: whether that’s a rebrand, a visual refresh, or adding new elements beyond the logo.
services.faq_question_3: How can I work with you on designing my brand?
services.faq_answer_3: You can contact us through the form on our website to discuss your brand needs and goals. Together, we’ll create a personalized design strategy aligned with your vision.
services.faq_question_4: How long does the design process take?
services.faq_answer_4: The time required to complete a project may vary depending on its complexity and scope. We’ll work together to define a realistic timeline and meet the agreed deadlines.
services.faq_answer_5: We understand that building your brand is an important investment. That’s why the total is divided into three payments: 50% to secure your spot and begin the project, 25% midway through the process, and the remaining 25% upon delivery of the final files.
services.faq_question_6: Do you offer any other services besides social media and branding?
services.faq_answer_6: Yes, we also help with additional brand elements such as business cards, corporate stationery, packaging, website design, social media templates, product photography, branded GIFs, and more.
services.service_1_text: We create brands from strategy to visuals. We define concept, personality, and a cohesive visual identity that helps you stand out, connect with your audience, and grow with intention..
services.service_2_text: We design packaging and stationery aligned with your brand identity. Each piece is thoughtfully created to communicate consistency, elevate the customer experience, and reinforce your brand's value in every detail.
services.service_3_text: We manage your social media with strategy and purpose.We create brand-aligned content to increase visibility, connect with your audience, and strengthen your digital presence.
services.service_4_text: We design and develop functional, aesthetic, and strategic websites. Your website not only looks great, but also communicates your brand vision, enhances user experience, and converts visitors into clients.
services.service_5_text: We create photography aligned with your brand identity. Images designed to communicate clearly, build trust, and elevate your brand perception across social media, websites, and digital materials.
services.services_1_text: We create strategic identities that go beyond visuals. We develop brands with intention, consistency, and personality, aligning concept, design, and strategy to connect with the right audience and remain strong over time. From naming and logo design to the complete visual system, we build clear foundations for purpose-driven brands.
services.services_2_text: We design pieces that reinforce identity and elevate the brand experience. From packaging to corporate stationery, every element is thoughtfully crafted to communicate in a cohesive, functional, and aesthetic way, ensuring the brand feels professional, recognizable, and well cared for at every touchpoint.
services.services_3_text: We create content and visual strategies aligned with the essence of each project. We focus on building an authentic, cohesive, and engaging social media presence, combining design, strategy, and storytelling to generate connection, engagement, and strong brand positioning.
services.services_4_text: We design and develop functional, intuitive, and visually impactful websites. Each site is created to reflect the brand’s identity, enhance user experience, and achieve clear objectives, combining aesthetics, strategy, and usability on one powerful platform.
services.services_5_text: We create photographic content aligned with the brand’s visual identity and narrative. From product photography to lifestyle and portraits, we aim to produce images that communicate, connect, and convey the essence of the project, strengthening brand perception and value.
